portal_description:
Red Hat OpenShift Data Foundation 4.21.9 security, enhancement & bug fix update

FIXED BUGS:
==========
DFBUGS-7386: RHODF 4.21.9 release
DFBUGS-7384: DR Page UI broken after OCP upgrade from 4.21 to 4.22 nightly
DFBUGS-7353: [release-4.21] CLONE - [GSS] odf-blackbox-exporter ODFNodeLatencyHighOnOSDNodes : msg="Timeout reading from socket" module=icmp_internal
DFBUGS-7350: [4.21] CLONE - Activity modal does not show Recent events
DFBUGS-7330: [Backport for 4.21] - [GSS][ODF][MCG]  noobaa-db-pg-cluster won't synchronize anymore - "could not receive data from WAL stream: ERROR:  requested WAL segment 00000008000001C600000068 has already been removed"
DFBUGS-7322: [release-4.21] Ceph CSI mount failures after multiple node reboots in IPv6 OCP cluster due to librados transport shutdown (ret=-108)
DFBUGS-7317: [Backport to 4.21] - noobaa-core-0 intermittent CrashLoopBackOff due to OOMKilled during object delete workload - map_deleter unbounded memory consumption
DFBUGS-7014: [Critical] Upgrade ceph version to RHCEPH-9.0z3 at ODF-4.21.9
DFBUGS-6938: [4.21.z] Integrate ibm-storage-odf-operator 1.9.0
DFBUGS-6869: CVE vulnerabilities in ODF 4.21 release
DFBUGS-6850: [4.21 clone] - RDR Uninstall fails to delete mirrorpeer when one managed cluster is offline
DFBUGS-6809: [4.21] CLONE - [provider][UI] nfs storageclass is not displaying in manage distribution of resources window in storage consumer page
DFBUGS-6527: [Backport to 4.21.z] maintenance mode is always set for storageclients in non RDR clusters
DFBUGS-6521: CLONE 4.21 - [UI] Resource profile calculations doesn't include NFS
DFBUGS-6459: Backport to odf-4.21.z [RDR] Partial s3StoreProfile missing in ramen-hub-operator-config after upgrading hub from ODF 4.17 to 4.18
DFBUGS-5927: StorageCluster is not in healthy state where TechPreviewNoUpgrade is enabled on OCP
portal_solution:
Before applying this update, make sure all previously released errata
relevant to your system have been applied.

For details on how to apply this update, refer to:

https://docs.redhat.com/en/documentation/red_hat_openshift_data_foundation/4.21/html/updating_openshift_data_foundation/updating-ocs-to-odf_rhodf
